The '''snow falcons''' were avian creatures native to the frigid [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Rhinnal/Legends|Rhinnal]],<ref name="CC" /> where they built eyries within glaciers.<ref name="DA" />

During the [[Galactic War]], the endangered snow falcons of Rhinnal were considered a rare and prized delicacy, worth a small fortune to those willing to risk life imprisonment by hunting them.<ref name="Poaching" /> These creatures became extinct prior to the rule of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]].<ref name="DA" /> The [[Holographic Zoo of Extinct Animals]] on the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]] planet [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] dedicated an exhibition in honor of the extinct snow falcon, which gained widespread popularity among visitors.<ref name="CC" />
